body: This is analogous to the changes made in https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/pull/2013.
title: Use dates instead of floating-point for spinup

body:
This PR updates the dependencies for AMIP and CMIP. The main updates are ClimaTimeSteppers v0.10.5, ClimaAtmos v0.41.3, ClimaLand v1.10.2.

I also removed the hard-coded main branch of ClimaLand in the AMIP manifest for Julia 1.11 (it looks like it may have been added by accident in #2022).
title: Update dependencies
